description: This file provides helper functions for storing inspection photos on local disk within an asset management platform. It includes functions to ensure filename safety, derive file extensions, and save uploaded image files to a structured directory layout, returning relative paths for database storage.

methods.name: str _safe_filename(name: str)
methods.description: Sanitizes a filename to prevent path traversal by extracting only the basename.

methods.name: str _guess_ext(filename: str)
methods.description: Infers the file extension from the filename, ensuring lowercase and handling cases with or without an extension.

methods.name: str save_inspection_photo_mvp(*, asset_id: int, file: UploadFile)
methods.description: Saves an uploaded inspection photo to a structured directory on local disk, returning the relative file path for database reference.

ctags.name: save_inspection_photo_mvp
ctags.pattern: /^def save_inspection_photo_mvp(*, asset_id: int, file: UploadFile) -> str:$/
